channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Trump hosts a Mar-a-Lago lunch for TRUMP memecoin holders as the token sinks below $3 and ethics scrutiny roars. Will this rally the memecoin or seal its fate? 🔥 https://Blockchain.News/news/trump-memecoin-event-mar-a-lago-2026 #crypto #trump #memecoin

item.title: Aurelion puts $48M into XAUE, turning gold into yield. 🔥 Institutional-only DeFi bets on compounding gold backing. https:// Blockchain.News/news/aurelion-48m-xaue-yield-gold https://Blockchain.News/news/aurelion-48m-xaue-yield-gold #Crypto #DeFi #GoldYield

item.title: Quantum shock: a 15-bit ECC crack signals a looming quantum risk to Bitcoin’s 256-bit shield. ⛓️ https://Blockchain.News/news/quantum-computer-cracks-15bit-ecc-key-bitcoin-risk #crypto #quantum #bitcoin
